inline_comments.message: isn't this a breaking change here?  how would this be backward compatible? we are assuming if nothing is present it must be multi cloud but that really isn't true.

Here's my thought process:
1. I'm not aware that the plugin vnf adapter is being used (at the moment) except by the multicloud plugin - so absence of the cloud_site entry defaulting to using multicloud seemed ok.  (the regular openstack-adapter shouldn't be affected)
2. If there 'are' other plugin adapters being utilized, they can still use the records in the cloud_site table.

Basically, it seems to me that Multicloud plugin adapter doesn't really 'need' records in the cloud_site table to work - so tried it out in code to see what it would look like.  If needs be, then I can change the patch to expect a cloud_site record.
